acceptanceCriteria: Schema test asserts the three new columns are present on `alertNotifications`
`packages/email/src/index.ts` exports `sendVerificationEmail(email, token)` that sends via Resend SDK
`packages/email/src/index.ts` exports `sendPasswordResetEmail(email, token)` that sends via Resend SDK
`packages/email/src/index.ts` exports `sendPriceAlert(userId, alertId, priceData)` that sends via Resend SDK and logs to `alertNotifications`
All methods read `RESEND_API_KEY` and `EMAIL_FROM` from environment variables
All methods handle Resend SDK errors gracefully without crashing
`priceAlertTemplate` function accepts game title, image URL, price data array (store name, price, referral URL), and unsubscribe URL, and returns an HTML string
`verificationTemplate` function accepts a verification URL and returns an HTML string
`passwordResetTemplate` function accepts a reset URL and returns an HTML string
Templates use inline CSS styles (no external stylesheets) for email client compatibility
Price alert template includes referral buy links for each store listing
`.env.example` includes `EMAIL_FROM`, `EMAIL_PROVIDER`, and `RESEND_API_KEY` entries with placeholder values
payload.issueBody:
## Overview
Implement the email notification service that sends price alert emails to users when their watchlist conditions are met.

## Transactional Email Provider
Use a managed transactional email service (free tier available):
- **Resend** (recommended — generous free tier, great DX, React Email templates)
- Alternatives: SendGrid, Postmark, AWS SES

## Emails to Send

### 1. Price Alert Triggered
Sent when a user's price alert fires.
- Game cover image
- Game title
- Alert condition that was triggered (e.g., "Now 75% off — $4.99")
- Price breakdown across all stores with referral buy links
- Unsubscribe link for this specific alert
- Link to manage all alerts

### 2. Account Emails (from #15)
- Email verification on registration
- Password reset

### 3. Weekly Digest (future enhancement — not required for MVP)
- Top deals this week for games on user's wishlist

## Tasks
- [ ] Set up transactional email provider account and configure DNS (SPF, DKIM, DMARC)
- [ ] Create `EmailService` with methods:
  - `sendPriceAlert(userId, alertId, priceData)` — consume from notification job queue
  - `sendVerificationEmail(userId, token)`  
  - `sendPasswordResetEmail(userId, token)`
- [ ] Design responsive HTML email templates (use React Email or MJML):
  - Price alert template with game image, deal details, store comparison table
  - Verification and reset templates
- [ ] Implement unsubscribe / one-click alert pause from email link (no login required — signed token)
- [ ] Add email send logging (store result in `alert_notifications` table)
- [ ] Test with multiple email clients (Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail) using a tool like Litmus or Email on Acid

## Environment Variables
```
EMAIL_FROM=deals@theresalwaysadeal.com
EMAIL_PROVIDER=resend
RESEND_API_KEY=
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- Price alert emails are sent within 5 minutes of a trigger being detected
- Emails render correctly in major email clients
- Unsubscribe link pauses the alert without requiring login
- Emails include referral buy links for each store

## Dependencies
- #19 Price Watchlist & Alert Rules API
- #15 User Authentication
